headline: Where To Invest Now In AI, Biotech, Small Caps, And Gold
summary: In this MoneyShow MoneyMasters Podcast episode, Jeffrey Hirsch, John McCamant, and Luke Lloyd discuss the forces shaping the stock market - and the best profit opportunities for H2 2026.
